findings.title: audits/index.json header counts show 2 open CRITICALs but all CRITICAL findings are closed
findings.detail: The index.json summary block (open_findings: 2, CRITICAL: 2) was not updated when AUDIT-factory-b6ff2b68 and AUDIT-factory-b5bd1864 were closed. Future agents reading only the header will incorrectly believe there are 2 open CRITICAL issues and may take unnecessary remedial action.
findings.fix_sketch: Set open_findings to 0 and all severity counts to 0 in the header summary block.

findings.title: AGENTS.md §8 mislabels NON_GOALS NG-7 as 'smoke-test-first rationale'
findings.detail: NG-7 in NON_GOALS.md is about DEFERRING comprehensive test coverage (intentional debt trade-off), not about adopting 'smoke-test-first' as a philosophy. The label 'smoke-test-first rationale' implies the strategy IS smoke-first, but NG-7 actually says smoke-only-this-sprint with full coverage next cycle. The IFleet AGENTS.md already carries the more precise characterization.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace 'smoke-test-first rationale' with 'intentional test-debt trade-off for sprint velocity' to match the actual NG-7 wording.

findings.title: STATUS.md last updated 2026-05-30 — 20 days stale, in-flight section references past audit branch
findings.detail: STATUS.md 'In flight' still lists audit/nightly-2026-05-30 as pending push, and the overall file was last updated 2026-05-30 (20 days ago). Per AGENTS.md §7 Always rules, STATUS.md must be updated at end of every session. This causes the next agent to read stale state.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a 2026-06-19 audit entry to Done section. Replace stale In-flight entry. Update Last updated footer.
